description: Canonical human/machine-readable discovery catalog for GENtle tutorials. Source units generate both this discovery catalog and the executable tutorial runtime manifest.

concepts.name: Shared Engine Contract
concepts.description: GUI, CLI, shell, and scripting interfaces execute the same operation semantics.

concepts.name: Deterministic Workflows
concepts.description: Operation chains should produce stable IDs and comparable outputs across repeated runs.

concepts.name: Sequence Lineage
concepts.description: Derived sequences are explicit products linked to upstream inputs and operations.

concepts.name: Genome Catalog Targeting
concepts.description: Prepared genome catalogs, annotation-based gene filters, and anchor extension connect imported entries to genomic context.

concepts.name: Guide Design Pipeline
concepts.description: Guide sets can be created, filtered, expanded to oligos, and exported with protocol context.

concepts.name: Artifact Exports
concepts.description: Representative outputs (CSV/protocol/SVG/text) are retained for auditability and sharing.

concepts.name: Tutorial Drift Checks
concepts.description: Tutorial content is generated from executable examples and verified in automated checks.

concepts.name: Contribution Loop
concepts.description: Contributions should couple code edits with docs updates and deterministic tests.

concepts.name: Online Opt-in Execution
concepts.description: Network-dependent chapters remain explicit opt-in and do not break offline default CI.

concepts.name: Isoform Architecture Panels
concepts.description: Curated transcript/protein architecture overlays can be imported and rendered as deterministic expert-view SVG outputs.

concepts.name: UniProt Projection Mapping
concepts.description: Reviewed UniProt protein annotations can be projected onto transcript/CDS geometry and reopened as one persisted expert-view artifact.

concepts.name: Feature Coding-DNA Attribution
concepts.description: A persisted UniProt projection can be queried for the exact coding DNA, exon attribution, and splice-junction exon pairs that encode one mapped protein feature.

concepts.name: Expert View Parity
concepts.description: The same expert-view payloads should be inspectable and renderable from GUI, CLI, and other adapters without frontend-only projection logic.
